View All Services on Itovio →
Launched 2026 · SaaS Product

Precise Portfolio

An AI-powered portfolio site generator that turns raw professional data into a fully deployed personal website — instantly, with no developer required.

Actively Used In Production

Itovio — IT Services Company

Itovio, a technology services company, uses Precise Portfolio to generate portfolio websites for their clients at scale — validating the tool in a real, high-volume production environment.

View Live Demo Full Details & Pricing →

Three Ways to Get Started

Structured Form

Fill in your name, role, education, experience, projects, and skills. The system generates a complete portfolio site from the submitted data.

AI Chat Intake

An enhanced AI chatbot interviews the user in a natural conversation, extracts all relevant data, and builds the portfolio automatically — no form filling required.

Resume Upload

Upload a PDF resume and the AI parses it instantly — extracting all professional data and generating a portfolio site without any manual input.

Built for Businesses at Scale

Precise Portfolio is a white-label SaaS tool designed for businesses that need to generate professional portfolio websites for a large audience — instantly and consistently.

Whether you are a staffing agency, university, HR platform, or freelance marketplace — rent the engine and deploy it under your brand.

✓

Instant portfolio generation — no developer needed

✓

Three intake modes — form, AI chat, and resume upload

✓

White-label ready — deploy under your own brand

✓

Custom tool development available from Precision Tech Insights

Inquire About Custom Development

Business Plans

Starter

Up to 100 portfolio sites / month

Popular

Growth

Up to 1,000 portfolio sites / month

Best Value

Enterprise / Custom

Unlimited sites, custom integrations, white-label branding, and dedicated support. Custom tool development also available.

All plans are rental-based. Free trial available for qualifying businesses.

About Precision Tech Insights

Founded in 2025 by Muhammad Haris, we're a Pakistan-based technology company with a global vision. Our mission is simple: deliver precision in every digital solution we create.

Muhammad Haris

CEO & Founder

Security researcher, developer, and entrepreneur with a passion for innovative technology solutions.

Our Vision

To become the leading technology partner for businesses seeking precision, innovation, and excellence in their digital transformation journey.

Our Approach

We combine cutting-edge technology with deep industry expertise to deliver solutions that not only meet but exceed expectations.
